transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: Gordo, you expressed interest at one time in unidentified flying objects, the feeling that there might be something to all these stories. Do you still feel that way?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, I feel that there have been a large number of fairly well qualified, or exceptionally well qualified I should say,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: people who have seen objects that have not had any really logical explanation other than this.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think that maybe in fact each and every one of them does have an explanation.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: But I think that there are so many possibilities, so many thousands of possibilities of other planets out somewhere in the universe that would have a livable atmosphere

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: that I would hate to rule out the possibility that maybe there are people or some type of human life on some of these.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: And if this is the case, then it's not too unfeasible to think that perhaps some of these objects might have been something of this type.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: You don't think that the comparatively short step out into space that the Mercury flight will take you on is far enough out to make any observations in this area?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, I think we're still at a fairly low order of getting out into space when you regard, when you speak of space and being millions of miles involved.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: We're only getting out a hundred miles or so.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: What about the so-called Glenn effect, Gordo, the snowflakes, the fireflies?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now both Shira and Carpenter seem to feel that it's frost of some nature off of the capsule,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
text: but apparently Glenn still sort of cast doubt on that theory.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764959 1920x1080 9000k
